items.title: Information about how to begin a data analytics, including prerequisites and advice
items.author: Kishore
items.content:
As data creation continues to grow, so too has the role of a data analyst. If you want to work and take a data analytics course in Hyderabad, you must meet certain prerequisites and develop specific skills. In our , this book will assist you in achieving your goal of becoming a data analyst by teaching you the essential skills required for the role and thoroughly comprehending the processes involved.

An overview of data analytics

To gather, handle, and statistically assess huge datasets, a specialist known as a data analyst is required. They learn how to use data to solve problems and find solutions. Data analysts are becoming increasingly important to an organization's performance as more businesses rely on data-driven decision-making.

How to Be a Data Analyst in 2025

1. The degree required for prior coursework

  • Data analyst positions usually require a bachelor's degree in computer science, statistics, data science, or a related field. Some people may need a master's degree, especially for more senior or specialized roles.
  • Related Courses: Focus on mathematics, statistics, computer programming, and data analysis. Studying business, finance, and economics can also be beneficial, depending on the career path you wish to take.

2. Essential Skills and Information

  • Understand statistical tests, distributions, and techniques for interpreting data.
  • Programming languages Among other languages, one must be proficient with Python, R, and SQL in order to handle and analyze data.
  • The practice of presenting results by creating data visualizations using tools like Tableau or Power BI is known as data visualization.
  • To gain real-world experience, work as a junior analyst in relevant sectors or do an internship.
  • Concentrate on independent or course-related real-world data analytics projects in order to develop a strong portfolio.

4. Innovative Instruments and Technologies

Learn more about big data tools, which are increasingly being used in data analysis. These systems include Spark and Hadoop, for example.

  • It can be helpful to have a basic understanding of machine learning techniques.

5. Soft skills and industry knowledge

  • Proficiency in Communication the ability to clearly and succinctly communicate complex ideas to stakeholders who lack technical expertise.
  • Possessing excellent analytical skills to use data to solve business challenges is one facet of problem-solving.
  • Details about the region If you have a solid understanding of the specific field you want to work in, such as technology, healthcare, or finance, your analysis will be much more relevant and helpful.

6. Networking and Professional Development

  • Associations for Professionals Join groups like the Data Science Association or the American Statistical Association.
  • Workshops and Conferences To network with colleagues and stay up to date on trends, attend industry conferences, webinars, and workshops.
  • Participate in online communities and forums (like Stack Overflow and GitHub) to share expertise and learn from others.

7. Obtaining a Data Portfolio Analysis

  • Create a strong CV that highlights your education, work history, and skills. Create a portfolio of your best work.
  • Getting Ready for the Interview: During the interview process, be prepared to talk about your previous work and demonstrate your analytical skills. Analyze example case studies and common data analysis interview questions.
  • As part of your ongoing education, earn degrees or certificates in data science and similar subjects.
  • Expertise If a particular field of data analysis interests you or is in great demand, consider focusing on it.
  • Leadership Positions As you develop your skills, aim for positions like analytics manager, data scientist, or senior data analyst.

To become a data analyst, one must complete the required coursework, acquire the requisite technical skills, and gain practical experience. You could set yourself up for a successful career in data analysis by adhering to the guidelines in this lesson. With dedication and continued study, you can become a proficient data analyst despite the possible challenges. This comprehensive course will give you the skills and knowledge needed for data analysis, as well as real-world experience and expert guidance. The moment to grow your data analysis profession is now!

items.title: How AI is Revolutionizing Crypto Launchpad Development?
items.author: BlockchainX
items.content:
In this Article about How AI is Revolutionizing Crypto Launchpad Development.

The Role of AI in the Blockchain Industry

The blockchain sector has seen rapid adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) alongside other industries which currently experience high growth of AI technology. The tools of artificial intelligence provide strong capabilities to optimize operations and assist with strategic choices and boost security measures. Blockchain technology uses AI to analyze extensive data while detecting fraud while controlling market predictions and optimizing smart contract execution.

Integration between blockchain systems produces better operational performance and scalability along with flexibility for changing requirements. Speed along with security and precision become essential requirements which drive AI as a necessary solution for blockchain-based crypto launchpads.

Overview of Crypto Launchpads

Crypto launchpads are digital platforms which provide new cryptocurrency startups with a platform to distribute their coins or tokens to investors during their initial fundraising period. The platforms unite blockchain projects with potential investors to help startups obtain funding while sharing their tokens during their initial phase. A launchpad system introduces transparency while developing trust because they perform objective evaluations to qualify projects which wish to access funding.

The Crypto Launchpad development ecosystem grows through their essential function which brings fresh projects to light as they encourage involvement from the community. The crypto world depends on launchpads to function effectively due to the quick boom of decentralized finance (DeFi) and Initial Coin Offerings (ICOs).

AI Integration in Crypto Launchpads

AI is transforming the functionality and efficiency of crypto launchpads in multiple ways. Here's a deeper look at how it’s being integrated:

  • Automating Project Vetting and Selection

AI algorithms can analyze enormous amounts of information relevant to a novel project, including its human resources, white papers, technology, and market fit. With AI, a launchpad can auto-vet to keep up the quality and viability of projects raising funds. It will also help to eliminate human bias and create trust in the platform.

  • Forecasting Market Trends Using AI

Indeed, data for an artificial intelligence system runs through so many datasets about the whole economy, including trends and investor sentiment as well as responses toward a new crypto project for all associated activities in the market. It then accordingly guides a project in adjusting its strategy in real-time to maximize fundraising and token launch. For investors, predictions guided by AI will allow them to make better decisions when it comes to the anticipated success of a project.

  • AI Solutions to Fortify Security

Security is a crucial concern in the crypto space, and AI provides another safety net. By employing machine learning algorithms, it can identify fraudulent activities, pinpoint vulnerabilities, or minimize transaction risks in real time to thwart cyberattacks. AI can also play a role in ensuring the integrity of the smart contracts deployed by the projects, thereby lessening the chances of bugs or exploitation.

Business Benefits of AI for Crypto Launchpad Development

AI is quite a significant asset beyond being technological; there is a great amount of business advantage for crypto launchpads: Increased Efficiency and Speed

Here, AI constantly automates several tasks, from vetting projects to distributing tokens and significantly increases effective speed with which launchpad operations are speeded up. In this manner, projects can go further in speedier time periods, thus resulting in the attraction of greater numbers of investors while reducing bottlenecks in operations.

  • Cost-Effective Operations Through automating resource-intensive tasks accurately, the AI can reduce operational costs. This therefore permits launchpads to grow in operations without the need to hire a lot of employees or put in a lot of resources. Predictive behavior analytics through AI executions allow resource utilization to be optimized at reduced operational costs.

  • Enhanced Risk Management Real-time AI tools can not only predict but also evaluate potential risks irrespective of their relationship with market volatility or regulatory modifications or account for project-specific aspects. The more advanced level analysis of risks could propel pre-emptive measures from launchpads for safeguarding the investors along with the platform in the longer run for the sake of credibility and trust.

  • Data-Driven Decision Making AI-driven insights provide valuable data that helps launchpad developers make more informed, data-driven decisions. Whether it be selecting projects, modifying token economics, or optimizing marketing strategies, AI allows teams to act based on real data rather than gut feeling or guesswork.

Fundraising Models Supported by Crypto Launchpads

Crypto launchpads typically support several fundraising models, including:

  • Initial Coin Offerings (ICOs)
  • Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs)
  • Initial Exchange Offerings (IEOs)
  • Security Token Offerings (STOs)
  • Initial NFT Offerings (INOs)

These models allow projects to access capital while offering early-stage investors various opportunities.

Market Trends and Future Outlook of Crypto Launchpad

  • Decentralized Finance (DeFi) Expansion
  • Greater Automation and AI
  • Cross-Chain Compatibility
  • Focus on Security and Compliance

Indeed, in many ways, artificial intelligence impacts the field of crypto launchpad development, by delivering more secure services, automated activities, and data-driven insights for both investors and project developers. In future times as artificial intelligence constantly develops, the role played in customize blockchain development solution projects will nevertheless be bigger and make cryptocurrency launchpads much more efficient, secure, and friendly to use.

With promises of full automation, advanced predictive analytics, and more intelligent security systems, the future of artificial intelligence in crypto launchpads appears to be positively dazzling. AI will continue to be a force shaping the next generation of platforms for raising funds in cryptocurrency as the blockchain industry continues to mature.

items.title: The five best AI tools of 2025
items.author: ScrapeStorm
items.content:
Due to the rapid development of artificial intelligence (AI) technology, it is gradually permeating various fields, one of which is the field of programming. The advent of AI programming tools has had a huge impact on programming, bringing unprecedented convenience and efficiency to programmers. This article introduces some AI programming tools to make your programming work more convenient.

GitHub Copilot is a programming support tool jointly developed by OpenAI and GitHub. Automatically generate code and make suggestions using AI models. When programmers write code, they simply enter comments and code snippets, and Copilot automatically generates the appropriate code.

It learns from a vast open source code repository and supports many programming languages. Therefore, it supports various code situations and provides codes with high accuracy. In addition to automatically generating code, it also provides support for writing programs efficiently, such as suggesting variable and function names.

Codeium is an AI code completion extension that can be used in IDEs (integrated development environments) such as VS Code and JetBrains. It positions itself as a code compilation tool that uses artificial intelligence to complete blocks of code without having to search everywhere on the internet. No matter what language or IDE you use, the tool can be easily integrated into your stack.

CodiumAI plugs into his IDE and suggests meaningful test suites while coding. This is done by exploring and analyzing code, documentation strings, comments, and dynamically interacting with developers.

Get her free CodiumAI for Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript (VSCode and JetBrains IDE supported)

HTTPie is a command line HTTP client. Its goal is to make CLI interactions with web services as human-friendly as possible. It provides a simple http command that allows you to send arbitrary HTTP requests using a simple and natural syntax, and displays the output with color coding. HTTPie can be used for testing, debugging, and general interaction with HTTP servers.

Codiga is a static code analysis tool available for a variety of platforms, IDEs, and other programs. It is primarily a security-focused product that allows real-time automatic code remediation. Essentially, this is a technique for keeping your code as efficient, safe, and clean as possible.

It supports the most widely used languages including YML, JavaScript, typescript, ruby, and Java.

items.title: Why Every Business Needs Advanced AI Laptops
items.author: leoarthur
items.content:
Is your business keeping up with the latest technology? If not, you might miss out on a powerful device like an AI-powered laptop. These advanced devices use artificial intelligence to boost productivity, enhance security, and streamline your work.

But why AI? It is because AI automates repetitive tasks, analyses data instantly, and helps you make smarter decisions.

Whether you're managing a team, handling finances, or running a startup, an AI laptop can save time and improve efficiency.

So, investing in an AI-powered laptop isn't just an upgrade; it's necessary for long-term success.

Let's know why every business needs advanced AI laptops.

AI Productivity Laptops Save Time and Resources

One of the biggest reasons every business needs AI laptops is that it saves time and resources. With a quickly changing business landscape, every minute can be costly.

AI smart laptops are powered by impressive processors, machine learning, and automation features that help you cut the clutter and focus on the work that matters most.

Here's how AI laptops save time and resources:

  • AI laptops process data at high speeds, which helps complete tasks in less time.
  • It helps you anticipate what you're looking for and automate routine tasks, like sorting emails and entering data.
  • AI reduces latency and keeps things running fast, helping you tackle multiple applications simultaneously.
  • The optimised battery life anticipates your needs and manages power consumption accordingly; AI helps you save battery while staying focused and productive.
  • AI learns the way you work, so it can simplify and streamline the work you do most.

Optimises Business Operation

Another reason why every business needs AI laptops is because they can optimize business operations. The system can simplify your business processes, making your task easy.

AI-powered laptops can help streamline many daily tasks, helping core operations run more efficiently and effectively.

For instance, AI can fill in spreadsheets automatically, schedule meetings for you, and even answer basic emails. This gets you and your team back to valuable groundwork and future-focused projects. AI adapts to your work habits and recommends actions to help you work more efficiently. In the long run, this leads to greater orderliness and greater efficiency.

Furthermore, Business France says that 65% of AI startups have secured investments, raising €13 billion since their creation.

Increases Security and Safeguards Corporate Information

Protecting your company from cybersecurity threats is one of the most important priorities for businesses today. Hackers and other cybercriminals do not just attack large businesses; they exploit those without the resources needed to protect themselves.

Built-in security AI laptops include privacy screens and intelligent webcams to protect your business's data and identity. These smart laptops use AI to sense and stop cyber threats before they can do any harm.

Here's how AI devices can increase security and safeguard corporate information:

  • Intelligent, real-time threat detection is always on, constantly scanning for security threats and alerting you before an issue arises.
  • Facial and fingerprint recognition in AI-driven systems such as biometric security ensures that only the right users access sensitive information.
  • AI helps ensure your laptop is consistently updated with the latest security updates.
  • AI automatically identifies other phishing scams to inform you of fraudulent emails before they come through.
  • AI encrypts your data to protect sensitive information from cybercriminals' hands.

Mitigates Cybersecurity Threats

AI-powered laptops have the potential to eliminate cybersecurity liabilities. As cyber threats continue to rise exponentially, businesses must have reliable protection. AI security features operate around the clock, scanning for and preventing attacks before they can cause harm.

In addition, most traditional security software is predicated on a reactive approach to security, responding to threats after they've already happened. AI machines learn patterns, recognise digital activity, identify unusual behaviour, and then take automatic action to restrict suspicious access. This added layer of protection goes a long way in safeguarding your business.

Assists Companies in Making More Informed Mobility Choices

To make the right business decisions, you need the best data at the best speed. So, AI-enabled laptops can process tonnes of information in seconds, guiding you to make more informed decisions. It can also analyse information in seconds that would take humans years to assemble.

Here's how AI assists companies to make more informed choices:

  • With data analysis, AI rapidly scans massive amounts of data to identify key patterns and trends.
  • Smart predictive insights provide predictive analytics to inform you on customer behaviour and market conditions.
  • Automated reports in AI can create clear and concise reports that aid in decision-making processes.
  • AI can identify errors in data and recommend fixes.
  • AI tools help you cut through the noise by summarising the most important information to take action faster.

Provides Business Strategy Advancement

Are AI-powered laptops the key to smarter business decisions? They certainly are! Their biggest advantage is helping you develop a better business strategy. Rather than wasting time manually combing through spreadsheets, you can save time by allowing AI to complete the task. It first surfaces the most important insights so you can start making data-driven decisions at warp speed.

As another example, if you have an e-commerce shop, more advanced AI tools can examine past customer purchase behaviour and recommend your top-selling products. Even if you're in the finance industry, one of the most popular uses of AI is that it allows you to predict market trends and make more informed investments. More efficient, AI-powered decision-making maximises your business's competitive advantage.

AI smart laptops are transforming the way businesses operate. They've become critical productivity multipliers for every business. They increase productivity, protect national security, and assist in lifesaving decisions. An AI-capable laptop can enhance your workflow, whether you are using it out of the house or from an office space.

With the smart technology that comes with an AI-powered laptop, your business can be more efficient, save money and outpace your competitors. These laptops automatically adjust to your every move, accelerating your workflow and empowering you to do more in less time.

items.title: Svelte vs React in 2025: Is It Time to Switch?
items.author: Paul Labhani Courage
items.content:
The JavaScript ecosystem is constantly evolving, and in 2025, one of the biggest debates among frontend developers remains: . React has dominated the industry for years, but Svelte’s rise as a lightweight, developer-friendly framework has many questioning whether it’s time to switch.

In this article, we’ll break down the key differences, performance benchmarks, job market trends, and future prospects of Svelte and React to help you decide which one to focus on in 2025.

1. Svelte vs React: Virtual DOM vs No Virtual DOM

React’s has long been praised for optimizing UI updates, but it introduces additional computational overhead. Svelte, on the other hand, eliminates the Virtual DOM altogether, compiling components into optimized JavaScript at build time. This makes and more efficient, especially on low-powered devices.

For developers searching for the best frontend framework in 2025, this is a crucial comparison.

2. Performance Showdown: Which One is Faster?

Performance is a major factor in choosing a frontend framework.

  • Since it compiles directly to JavaScript, it eliminates runtime overhead and ensures snappier performance, making it ideal for high-performance applications and mobile-friendly web development.
  • React has made significant improvements with React Server Components and concurrent rendering, but it still requires additional optimizations like memoization and useEffect cleanup to match Svelte’s raw speed.

If you’re looking for the fastest frontend framework in 2025, Svelte often has the edge.

3. Developer Experience: Which One is Easier to Learn?

React requires familiarity with JSX, hooks, state management libraries (like Redux or Zustand), and can sometimes feel complex for beginners. Svelte, in contrast, has a simpler syntax with , making it a great choice for developers looking for a smoother learning curve.

For those asking, "Which frontend framework is easiest to learn in 2025?", Svelte is often the answer.

4. Job Market & Career Opportunities in 2025

  • React remains the industry standard, with thousands of job listings globally. React developers are in high demand, and enterprise adoption is still growing.
  • Svelte’s job market is smaller, but it’s gaining traction among startups and cutting-edge projects. Some companies are already shifting to Svelte for performance-sensitive applications.

If you’re looking for , React is the safer bet. However, Svelte expertise could give you a competitive advantage in niche markets.

For developers wondering, "Which frontend framework has the most jobs in 2025?", React still leads—but Svelte is catching up.

5. Ecosystem & Community Support

React boasts a with thousands of libraries, frameworks, and integrations, making it easier to build full-scale applications. Svelte’s ecosystem is growing, but it still lacks the extensive third-party support React enjoys.

That said, if you prefer a leaner, faster framework with less boilerplate, Svelte could be the future of frontend development.

Final Verdict: Should You Switch to Svelte in 2025?

✅ You want strong job security, enterprise projects, and an extensive ecosystem. ✅ You prioritize performance, want an easier learning curve, and are working on fast, modern web applications.

Both frameworks are excellent, and learning both React and Svelte can future-proof your career.

What do you think? Are you considering switching to Svelte, or will React continue to be your go-to framework? Drop a comment below and let’s discuss!

🔥 Share this article with fellow developers debating between Svelte and React in 2025!

items.title: I built an AI Agent that can control a smart-home and you can too.
items.author: Ivo Brett
items.content:
AI Agents + MCP + Matter = Amazing Opportunity

The world of AI agents is evolving rapidly, with the ability to control real-world connected devices in smart homes. This advancement unlocks new opportunities for automation, enabling seamless interaction with physical environments through APIs.

However, integrating AI Agents with smart home devices is challenging. If you’ve ever tried to control IoT-based devices programmatically, you know how frustrating it can be—dealing with protocols, writing low-level code, and debugging endless connection issues.

That’s why I built the , an open-source tool that makes it ridiculously easy for AI Agents and AI assistants like Claude to control Matter devices using natural language. In this article, I’ll break down how it works, why it’s a game-changer for developers, and how you can set it up yourself.

Why I Built the Matter-MCP Server

When working with AI and IoT, I found myself constantly wrestling with connectivity complexity. Matter is an amazing protocol backed by industry giants, but it isn’t exactly built for AI-driven automation out of the box.

One major issue is the need to communicate with devices using the Matter protocol. This makes automation difficult, especially for developers working on AI-powered assistants.

That’s where MCP (Model-Context-Protocol) comes in. The Matter-MCP Server acts as a bridge between AI models and Matter devices, allowing seamless communication through structured interfaces. Instead of writing raw protocol commands, you can now control your IoT setup with simple, human-readable requests.

The Matter-MCP Server allows AI to:

✅ Commission new Matter devices (without manual intervention!)

✅ Read and update device attributes (e.g., check if a door is locked)

✅ Send commands in natural language (e.g., “Turn off the smart plug”)

✅ Monitor device status in real-time

✅ Search and access Matter protocol documentation dynamically

By leveraging , it makes AI-driven home automation smoother and more intuitive than ever.

How to Set It Up (Step-By-Step)

Setting up the Matter-MCP Server is easy! Here’s how to do it in a few minutes:

git clone https://github.com/MatterCoder/matter-mcp-server.git
matter-mcp-server

2️⃣ Set Up a Python Virtual Environment 

python3  venv .venv
 .venv/bin/activate  
pip  requirements.txt

4️⃣ Install UV (Required for AI Integration) 

curl  https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

If is unavailable, use :

wget  https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

Integrating with Claude (For AI-Powered Control)

To enable Claude to interact with the Matter-MCP Server, configure your Claude desktop settings:

1️⃣ Locate the claude_desktop_config.json file

  • : ~/Library/Application Support/Claude

2️⃣ Add the MCP Server Configuration

3️⃣ Restart Claude Desktop

Claude Code MCP Installation

You can also install the Matter MCP server in Claude Code using the claude mcp add command.

claude mcp add matter-mcp-server
uv REPLACE_WITH_FULL_PATH_TO_YOUR_REPO] run matter-mcp-server.py

The Python Matter Server is used by my MCP server. The Python Matter Server, from the Open Home Foundation, implements a Matter Controller Server over WebSockets using the official Matter (formerly CHIP) SDK.

Testing with a Matter device?

A Matter Virtual Device (MVD) is a software-based emulator provided by Google that simulates Matter-compatible smart home devices for testing and development. It allows developers to validate device behavior without physical hardware. To set it up, use the Matter Virtual Device Tool, follow the steps in the MVD official guide

Debugging Your AI-Powered IoT Setup

If you are having difficulties, you can check the communication to the python matter server websocket by running these sample scripts:

python samples/Commission_with_Code.py

python samples/Get_Node.py

📌 

python samples/Send_a_command.py

Expanding Your AI Agent’s Capabilities

To make your AI assistant even smarter, you can add additional MCP servers:

This allows your AI model to dynamically search for relevant Matter documentation and device commands and attributes without manual intervention.

The is a for AI-driven IoT automation. Instead of spending hours wrestling with protocols, developers can now integrate Matter devices with AI assistants in minutes.

If you’re interested in making AI in smart home automation,

✅ Just AI-powered IoT magic.

Check out my youtube video

If you found this journey inspiring or have insights to share, feel free to connect and collaborate. Together, we can harness technology to create solutions that truly matter.

items.title: How AI is Changing Medicine
items.author: Alona Potapova
items.content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing medicine in ways we never imagined. From diagnosing diseases faster to personalizing treatments, AI is transforming patient care. But beyond technology, what does this mean for real people - doctors, nurses, and patients? Let's take a look at how AI is changing medicine and making a real impact.

Faster and More Accurate Diagnoses

One of the biggest contributions of AI to medicine is improving the speed and accuracy of diagnostics. Traditional methods often rely on human expertise, which can be labor-intensive and sometimes error-prone. AI-powered tools like deep learning algorithms can analyze medical images and detect abnormalities much faster than humans. For example, AI systems can detect early signs of cancer in mammograms or lung scans with impressive accuracy. This not only helps doctors make more informed decisions, but also gives patients the chance for earlier, potentially life-saving treatment.

Personalized Treatment Plans

Every patient is unique, and AI helps tailor treatment to individual needs. Machine learning algorithms analyze vast amounts of data, including genetic information, medical history, and lifestyle factors. With this insight, doctors can recommend personalized treatments that are more effective and have fewer side effects. For example, in cancer treatment, AI can predict how a patient will respond to different drugs. This means fewer trial-and-error approaches and more precise treatments, leading to better outcomes and a higher quality of life.

AI in Surgery: Enhancing Precision and Safety

AI also makes surgeries safer and more efficient. Robotic surgery controlled by AI provides greater precision than human hands. These systems help reduce complications, shorten recovery times, and improve surgical outcomes. Take the da Vinci surgical system, for example. It allows surgeons to perform minimally invasive procedures with increased precision. This technology is especially useful for delicate surgeries, such as neurosurgery or heart valve repair, where precision is critical.

Virtual Health Assistants and Chatbots

Getting timely medical advice has become easier thanks to AI-powered chatbots and virtual healthcare assistants. These digital tools quickly answer medical questions, remind patients to take their medications, and even help them book appointments. For patients with chronic conditions, AI-powered assistants can track symptoms and provide recommendations in real-time. This not only reduces unnecessary hospital visits, but also empowers people to take control of their health.

AI in Drug Discovery and Development

Developing new drugs is a long and expensive process, but AI is speeding it up. Traditional drug discovery can take years, but AI-powered models can analyze data and identify potential drug candidates much faster. During the COVID-19 pandemic, AI has helped researchers identify potential treatments in record time. By analyzing existing drugs and their effects, AI has provided important insights, accelerating the development of new treatments. This innovation means that we could see faster treatments for many diseases in the future.

items.title: From Assistant to Decision-Maker: 7 Ways AI is Transforming PCs
items.author: Jonathan Jone
items.content:
AI is no longer limited to automating repetitive tasks—it is actively improving user experiences, enhancing security and optimizing system performance. From making our devices more intuitive to helping businesses make data-driven decisions, AI is shaping the future of computing.

Whether it is assisting creative professionals, personalizing user settings, or integrating seamlessly with other smart technologies, AI is turning PCs into intelligent partners.

The transformation of AI in PCs is not just about convenience but about making technology more proactive and adaptive. AI-powered PCs can analyze data, learn from user habits and provide intelligent responses.

This shift is crucial for the future of digital innovation, where efficiency, security and productivity are key factors. Let us explore how AI is transforming PCs and why this shift is essential in modern computing.

1. Enhancing Voice Assistants

AI-powered voice assistants have been around for a while, but they have improved significantly. Today, these assistants understand natural language better and provide more accurate responses. enables them to learn from user behaviour, making them more personalized and helpful.

Instead of just setting reminders or answering questions, AI-powered assistants can now help with complex tasks like

  • Scheduling meetings by analyzing calendar availability.
  • Summarizing long emails and suggesting responses.
  • Managing workflows and automating repetitive tasks.

These advancements make voice assistants more than just digital helpers. They are becoming integral to everyday computing, making tasks more efficient and hands-free.

2. Improving Security with AI

AI is making PCs more secure by providing advanced protection mechanisms beyond traditional passwords and antivirus programs. AI-driven security systems can detect unusual activity in real time and prevent cyber threats before they cause harm.

Some ways AI enhances security include

Facial recognition and biometric authentication: AI-powered security features ensure that only authorized users can access sensitive information. In 2024, 54% of organizations in the United States reported utilizing AI for monitoring network traffic, highlighting the growing adoption of AI in security protocols.

: AI monitors user habits and detects anomalies, preventing unauthorized access.

: AI can scan emails and websites to detect phishing attempts and warn users before they fall victim to cyberattacks.

With AI, PC security is more proactive, reducing the risk of breaches and ensuring data safety.

3. Optimizing Performance with AI

AI performance optimization enables PCs to enhance their speed and efficiency as a result. The system achieves smooth operation by allowing AI to analyze user habits followed by system optimization.

The major benefits of performance enhancement through AI technology consist of

  • The system uses artificial intelligence to control power consumption through setting adjustments and process reductions which enhances battery stamina.
  • AI distributes system memory along with processing capabilities by halting unnecessary programs to direct resources toward active operations.
  • Program operations benefit substantially from AI optimization which helps decrease delays and promotes better computational speed.
  • AI system enhancements enable PCs to process complicated operations much more competently without sacrificing performance stability.

4. Boosting Creativity and Productivity

AI is helping users become more productive and creative by assisting in various tasks, from writing emails to editing photos and videos. AI-powered tools are making content creation more accessible and efficient.

Examples of AI-driven productivity enhancements include

: AI-powered tools like Grammarly and Microsoft Word's AI suggest better sentence structures and correct grammar. Additionally, AI-driven content creation tools have been shown to improve performance by 58%, enabling faster and more efficient content production

: AI in Photoshop can automatically remove backgrounds, enhance image and suggest design improvements.

: AI-driven applications analyze user work habits and provide relevant recommendations for efficiency.

These advancements save time and effort, allowing users to focus on creativity and innovation rather than manual adjustments and corrections.

5. Personalizing User Experiences

Through personalization AI delivers one of the principal methods to transform Personal Computers. Through learning about user behavior and preferences and work patterns AI develops targeted user experiences that boost system usability.

The following user experience customization methods exist because of AI deployment

  • AI technologies present relevant software options that help users organize their files effectively.
  • AI modifies system settings that control brightness level as well as audio volume and performance mode settings through observation of user behavior.
  • PC gaming quality receives AI-based graphic optimization that suits hardware strength for better performance in games.

AI-based customization enables PCs to respond naturally to user needs without interruption while becoming more accessible to operate smoothly.

6. Assisting in Decision-Making

AI is not just assisting users but also helping them make better decisions by analyzing vast amounts of data quickly and providing valuable insights.

Some decision-making applications of AI in PCs include:

: AI processes business data to predict market trends and customer behaviors.

: AI helps individuals manage budgets, investments and savings based on spending patterns.

Career growth suggestions: AI analyzes professional development opportunities and suggests skill-building programs.

: AI provides tailored suggestions for shopping, travel and entertainment based on user preferences.

By processing and interpreting data in real-time, AI empowers users to make informed decisions for both personal and professional growth.

7. Integrating with Other Technologies

Artificial Intelligence enables PCs to easily merge with other intelligent devices and technologies which establishes smooth connectivity between different systems.

Some AI-driven integrations include

  • As an AI-powered computer system can control complete smart home systems which manage both security cameras and lighting devices.
  • AI allows PCs to establish wireless connection between their system and wearables as well as smart appliances and cloud-based applications.
  • The presence of AI enables people to obtain cloud services using a single platform for storage management.

The integration capabilities of AI make PCs into central systems that control digital ecosystems while providing better convenience and improved efficiency.

AI reached its present state from being an assistant tool to now playing an essential role in decision-making applications. The technology implements better security features and boosts system performance as well as provides improved user interaction.

Future advancements in AI development will transform the way we perform digital tasks in the digital world. Users can benefit from AI-powered innovations which secure their position and productivity while providing safety in the constantly developing technological environment.

Users from all fields including business professionals gamers and creative artists have access to efficient custom-tailored AI-powered PC systems which improve their computing experience.

items.title: A Step-by-Step Guide to Install DeepSeek-V3-0324 Locally
items.author: Aditi Bindal
items.content:
DeepSeek has once again raised the bar in artificial intelligence with the release of DeepSeek-V3-0324, an open-source language model that significantly outperforms its predecessors. The model effortlessly surpasses its top-notch competitors like GPT-4.5 and Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Beyond raw performance metrics, DeepSeek-V3-0324 offers enhanced code executability for front-end web development, helping developers to produce more aesthetically pleasing web pages and game interfaces. Additionally, it demonstrates improved proficiency in Chinese writing, aligning with the R1 style and delivering higher quality in medium-to-long-form content.

Deploying a model of this caliber locally might seem daunting at first due to its substantial 671 billion parameters. However, Unsloth has made it entirely feasible. Unsloth has used selective quantization techniques to reduce the model's size without any significant loss of accuracy by targeting specific layers, such as the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers, while preserving the precision of attention and other critical layers.

In the following guide, we'll walk you through the step-by-step process of installing and running DeepSeek-V3-0324 locally using LLaMA.cpp and Unsloth's dynamic quants, ensuring you can access its full potential efficiently and effectively.

The system requirements for running DeepSeek-V3-0324 are:

  • GPU: Multiple H100s or H200s (count may vary across different bits)

  • Storage: 1TB+ (preferable)

  • Nvidia Cuda or Jupyter Notebook installed.

  • Disk Space requirements depending on the type of model are as follows:

We recommend you to take a screenshot of this chart and save it somewhere to quickly look up to the disk space prerequisites before trying a specific bit quantized version.

For this article, we'll download the 2.71-bit version (recommended).

Step-by-step process to install DeepSeek-V3-0324 locally

For the purpose of this tutorial, we’ll use a GPU-powered Virtual Machine by NodeShift since it provides high compute Virtual Machines at a very affordable cost on a scale that meets GDPR, SOC2, and ISO27001 requirements. Also, it offers an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it easier for beginners to get started with Cloud deployments. However, feel free to use any cloud provider of your choice and follow the same steps for the rest of the tutorial.

Step 1: Setting up a NodeShift Account

Visit app.nodeshift.com and create an account by filling in basic details, or continue signing up with your Google/GitHub account.

If you already have an account, login straight to your dashboard.

Step 2: Create a GPU Node

After accessing your account, you should see a dashboard (see image), now:

1) Navigate to the menu on the left side.

2) Click on the  option.

3) Click on to start creating your very first GPU node.

These GPU nodes are GPU-powered virtual machines by NodeShift. These nodes are highly customizable and let you control different environmental configurations for GPUs ranging from H100s to A100s, CPUs, RAM, and storage, according to your needs.

Step 3: Selecting configuration for GPU (model, region, storage)

1) For this tutorial, we’ll be using 2x H200 GPU, however, you can choose any GPU as per the prerequisites.

2) Similarly, we’ll opt for 5TB storage by sliding the bar. You can also select the region where you want your GPU to reside from the available ones.

Step 4: Choose GPU Configuration and Authentication method

1) After selecting your required configuration options, you'll see the available GPU nodes in your region and according to (or very close to) your configuration. In our case, we'll choose a 2x H200 140GB GPU node with 192vCPUs/504GB RAM/5TB SSD.

2) Next, you'll need to select an authentication method. Two methods are available: Password and SSH Key. We recommend using SSH keys, as they are a more secure option. To create one, head over to our official documentation.

The final step is to choose an image for the VM, which in our case is , where we’ll deploy and run the inference of our model through LLaMA.cpp. If you want a web UI interface to save and run custom files, you may choose the Jupyter Notebook image as well.

That's it! You are now ready to deploy the node. Finalize the configuration summary, and if it looks good, click to deploy the node.

Step 6: Connect to active Compute Node using SSH

1) As soon as you create the node, it will be deployed in a few seconds or a minute. Once deployed, you will see a status in green, meaning that our Compute node is ready to use!

2) Once your GPU shows this status, navigate to the three dots on the right, click on , and copy the SSH details that appear.

As you copy the details, follow the below steps to connect to the running GPU VM via SSH:

1) Open your terminal, paste the SSH command, and run it.

2) In some cases, your terminal may take your consent before connecting. Enter ‘yes’.

3) A prompt will request a password. Type the SSH password, and you should be connected.

Step 7: Install and build LLaMA.cpp

is a C++ library for running LLaMA and other large language models efficiently on GPUs, CPUs and edge devices.

We'll first install as we'll use it to install and run DeepSeek-V3-0324.

1) Start by creating a virtual environment using Anaconda.

conda create -n deepseek python=3.11 -y && conda activate deepseek

2) Once inside the environment, update the Ubuntu package source-list for fetching the latest repository updates and patches.

3) Install dependencies for llama.cpp.

apt-get install pciutils build-essential cmake curl libcurl4-openssl-dev -y

4) Clone the official repository of llama.cpp.

git clone https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp

4) Compile 's build files.

In the below command, keep if you're running it on a non-GPU system. However, it's recommended to keep it , even if you're on a GPU-based system, as it will allow llama.cpp's compilation process to occur through CPU, which is faster in this case as compared to GPU-based compilation. In addition to being slow, compiling through GPU can sometimes throw unwanted errors.

cmake llama.cpp -B llama.cpp/build \
    -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF -DGGML_CUDA=OFF -DLLAMA_CURL=ON

5) Build from the build directory.

cmake --build llama.cpp/build --config Release -j --clean-first --target llama-quantize llama-cli llama-gguf-split

6) Finally, we'll copy all the executables from that start with into the directory.

cp llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-* llama.cpp

Step 8: Download the Model Files

We'll download the model files from Hugging Face using a Python script.

1) To do that, let's first install the Hugging Face Python packages.

pip install huggingface_hub hf_transfer

  • - Provides an interface to interact with the Hugging Face Hub, allowing you to download, upload, and manage models, datasets, and other resources.

  • - A tool optimized for faster uploads and downloads of large files (e.g., LLaMA, DeepSeek models) from the Hugging Face Hub using a more efficient transfer protocol.

2) Run the model installation script with Python.

python -c "import os; os.environ['HF_HUB_ENABLE_HF_TRANSFER'] = '1'; from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download(repo_id='unsloth/DeepSeek-V3-0324-GGUF', local_dir='unsloth/DeepSeek-V3-0324-GGUF', allow_patterns=['*UD-Q2_K_XL*'])"

Depending on your GPU configuration, the download process can be slow and take some time. The installation might also seem stuck at some points, which is normal, so do not interrupt or kill the installation in between.

Step 9: Run the Model for Inference

Finally, once all checkpoints are downloaded, we can proceed to the inference part.

In the below command, we'll run the model with a prompt given inside a formatted template which will be run through LLaMA.cpp's LLaMA-CLI tool. The prompt will ask the model to create a Flappy Bird game in Python with all the interface, logic, and controls.

./llama.cpp/llama-cli \
    --model unsloth/DeepSeek-V3-0324-GGUF/UD-Q2_K_XL/DeepSeek-V3-0324-UD-Q2_K_XL-00001-of-00006.gguf \
    --cache-type-k q8_0 \
    --threads 20 \
    --n-gpu-layers 2 \
    -no-cnv \
    --prio 3 \
    --temp 0.3 \
    --min_p 0.01 \
    --ctx-size 4096 \
    --seed 3407 \
    --prompt "<｜User｜>Create a Flappy Bird game in Python. You must include these things:\n1. You must use pygame.\n2. The background color should be randomly chosen and is a light shade. Start with a light blue color.\n3. Pressing SPACE multiple times will accelerate the bird.\n4. The bird's shape should be randomly chosen as a square, circle or triangle. The color should be randomly chosen as a dark color.\n5. Place on the bottom some land colored as dark brown or yellow chosen randomly.\n6. Make a score shown on the top right side. Increment if you pass pipes and don't hit them.\n7. Make randomly spaced pipes with enough space. Color them randomly as dark green or light brown or a dark gray shade.\n8. When you lose, show the best score. Make the text inside the screen. Pressing q or Esc will quit the game. Restarting is pressing SPACE again.\nThe final game should be inside a markdown section in Python. Check your code for errors and fix them before the final markdown section.<｜Assistant｜>"

The model has started generating the code as shown below:

Once the process is complete, it may end the output like this:

As we run the code for the Flappy Bird game generated by DeepSeek-V3-0324 through VSCode Editor, it opens a game panel as shown below (Note: Install pygame in your editor before running the code):

You can see the live demonstration of the game in the video below:

​In this guide, we've dived into the detailed process of installing and running DeepSeek-V3-0324 locally, leveraging tools like LLaMA.cpp and Unsloth's dynamic quantization to manage the 671 billion parameters effectively. While local deployment offers control and customization, it can be resource-intensive for such a huge model. This is where NodeShift's cloud platform becomes invaluable, providing affordable and scalable AI cloud resources through an intuitive and easy-to-use interface. By quickly utilizing GPU or compute nodes with NodeShift, developers can effortlessly deploy and scale models like DeepSeek-V3-0324, ensuring robust performance without the complexities of managing local infrastructure.

For more information about NodeShift:

items.title: Top AI Tools Transforming Employee Training in 2024
items.author: Hana Sato
items.content:
The way companies train their employees is changing—fast. Traditional learning management systems (LMS) are no longer sufficient to keep up with today’s dynamic workplace needs. As job roles evolve and upskilling becomes non-negotiable, organizations are turning to Artificial Intelligence (AI) to design smarter, more efficient, and deeply personalized training experiences.

To dive deeper into this shift, don’t miss our exclusive webinar:

In this article, we break down some of the most impactful AI-powered tools that are reshaping employee training in 2024—tools that L&D leaders across industries are already integrating into their strategy.

1. Docebo – AI-Powered Learning Experience Platform (LXP)

Docebo has positioned itself as a frontrunner in AI-driven corporate learning by enabling hyper-personalized learning paths. Its AI analyzes user behavior, job roles, and content interaction to recommend training modules tailored to each employee’s needs.

  • AI-based content suggestions
  • Learner sentiment analysis

A global telecom company used Docebo to cut course discovery time by 40%, boosting course completion rates significantly.

2. Degreed – Upskilling with Intelligent Skill Graphs

Degreed focuses on skill development and internal mobility. Its AI maps existing skill sets against role requirements, guiding employees on personalized upskilling journeys. It also helps L&D teams identify organizational skill gaps in real-time.

  • Skill analytics dashboards
  • AI-curated content from multiple sources (Coursera, Udemy, etc.)

With Degreed, companies report faster onboarding and a 30% increase in internal promotions.

3. EdCast by Cornerstone – Enterprise Learning, Simplified

EdCast uses AI to provide a Netflix-like experience for corporate learners. Its algorithm curates content across internal libraries and external platforms to deliver microlearning based on employee goals, behaviors, and job roles.

  • Content aggregation from multiple sources
  • AI-driven search and recommendations
  • Multilingual learning support with NLP

Multinational firms use EdCast to standardize L&D across geographies without losing personalization.

4. Synthesia – AI Video Training, Simplified

If you're looking to scale video-based training without burning budgets, Synthesia is a game-changer. It allows teams to create engaging learning videos using AI avatars and text-to-speech in over 120 languages—no cameras or production crews required.

  • Custom voice and branding options
  • Multilingual video output

Retail brands use Synthesia to roll out product training in multiple regions simultaneously.

5. Eightfold Talent Intelligence – AI That Predicts Learning Needs

While known for talent acquisition, Eightfold’s AI also supports L&D by identifying skill adjacencies and predicting future learning requirements. It recommends personalized learning plans to help employees grow into emerging roles before they’re even posted.

  • Talent forecasting powered by deep learning
  • Personalized learning nudges

Companies use Eightfold to proactively close future skill gaps, aligning learning with workforce planning.

6. Learn Amp – Connected Learning Ecosystem

Learn Amp integrates learning, performance, and engagement into a single AI-enhanced platform. It adapts content delivery based on employee goals, performance data, and feedback loops, making learning a continuous part of the workday.

  • Pulse surveys with AI sentiment tracking
  • Workflow learning integrations

Mid-sized firms use Learn Amp to boost employee engagement and reduce training abandonment rates.

7. TalentLMS + ChatGPT Plug-in – Conversational Learning in Action

TalentLMS now integrates with generative AI tools like ChatGPT to enable and micro-assessments. This makes it easier for learners to ask questions, receive instant answers, and reinforce learning with quizzes generated on-the-fly.

  • AI chatbot-powered support
  • Auto-generated assessments
  • On-demand content assistance

Training teams use it to reduce dependency on live instructors while keeping the experience interactive.

In a world where skills have a shelf life of just 2.5 years, companies can no longer afford static learning strategies. AI tools not only speed up course creation and delivery—they ensure learning is continuous, contextual, and career-aligned.

And as more companies adopt hybrid or remote models, these AI-driven platforms offer scalable and intelligent ways to keep employees engaged, productive, and ahead of the curve.

Final Thoughts: The AI-Led Future of L&D

2024 marks a tipping point in how organizations approach employee training. The shift from generic learning modules to data-driven, adaptive learning ecosystems is no longer optional—it’s strategic.

For L&D leaders, the path forward lies in leveraging AI not as a tool, but as a learning partner. The tools above are just a few examples of what’s possible when innovation meets intent.

items.title: Vibe Coding: Transforming Software Development Forever
items.author: Ayush Chaudhary
items.content:
The tech world is buzzing with a revolutionary concept that’s changing the way software is developed — Vibe Coding. Popularized by Andrej Karpathy in early 2025, vibe coding leverages AI-driven tools to generate code based on natural language descriptions provided by users.

This paradigm shift opens doors for faster development, broader accessibility, and heightened creativity while challenging traditional programming methods. This blog delves into the fundamentals of vibe coding, explores its advantages and challenges, highlights cutting-edge Intelligent Development Environments (IDEs) such as GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Trae.ai, and addresses its future potential.

Vibe Coding is a transformative programming technique that utilizes large language models (LLMs) to convert human-readable prompts into executable code. Instead of painstakingly writing each line yourself, you simply describe the functionality you need, and the AI generates the code in seconds.

Origin: It was coined by Andrej Karpathy, one of AI’s leading figures, marking a pivotal moment in AI-driven software development. How It Works: Developers input casual or technical descriptions, such as “create a chatbot API,” and AI tools handle the coding process — from backend structures to executable outputs.

User Focus: The focus shifts from syntax mastery to creative ideation, enabling users to concentrate on “what to build” rather than “how to code.”

With vibe coding, developers can bypass repetitive tasks and rapidly build prototypes. What once took weeks or months can now be achieved in hours, making it ideal for startup projects and rapid iterations.

Accessibility for All Users: Vibe coding democratizes software creation — individuals without coding expertise can craft applications by describing their ideas. Small businesses, designers, and entrepreneurs have found this game-changing.

AI tools free developers from manual syntax-related tasks, allowing them to focus on larger concepts and innovative problem-solving. Vibe coding enables exploratory workflows that foster creativity across industries.

From freelancers to Fortune 500 companies, vibe coding minimizes dependence on large teams, reducing costs for development projects.

Challenges in Vibe Coding

Code Quality and Maintainability: AI-generated code is functional but not always optimized. Without proper reviews, issues like unreadable code structures or technical debt can accumulate. Developers must balance speed with maintainability.

AI tools might inadvertently introduce vulnerabilities like exposed API keys or poor encryption methods. Vigilance and manual audits are essential to ensure security compliance.

Over-Reliance on AI Tools: Complete dependency on vibe coding tools can hinder developers’ ability to debug issues or create highly customized solutions. Developers must remain actively involved in the process.

Automation raises industry-wide questions about bias in AI, intellectual property, and job displacement for human programmers.

Also, Read about Automating RAG Pipelines with Bash.

IDEs Driving the Vibe Coding Revolution

Cutting-edge Intelligent Development Environments (IDEs) are powering vibe coding, offering features that make AI-assisted programming seamless and efficient. Let’s dive into three standout IDEs:

GitHub Copilot, powered by OpenAI Codex, acts as an AI pair programmer. It suggests code snippets, automates repetitive tasks, and integrates smoothly with IDEs such as VS Code.

Multi-language support for diverse programming needs.

Context-aware code suggestions tailored to project specifics.

Ability to generate complex functions based on single-line comments.

Example: Developers can type

// Build a function that checks user input validity

and Copilot instantly produces a tailored function.

Cursor is an IDE designed for interactive programming, enabling conversational coding and debugging.

Allows developers to ask questions like “What’s wrong with this function?” directly in the IDE.

Supports collaborative real-time coding for team projects.

Tailored for vibe coding workflows focused on iterative improvements.

Example: Developers can refine SQL queries or API endpoints by asking Cursor for optimizations.

Trae.ai is redefining vibe coding with free access to pro-tier models like Claude 3.7 and DeepSeek R1, making it easier for individuals and teams to harness advanced AI for development without incurring costs.

Converts natural language descriptions into secure, production-ready code. Provides pre-built modules for common functionalities like authentication or payment systems.

Tracks code performance and scores maintainability, enhancing project longevity.

Why Trae.ai Stands Out:

Trae.ai is currently free to use, granting users access to high-performance AI models like Claude 3.7 and DeepSeek R1 — ideal for startups or those experimenting with vibe coding.

A prompt like “Build a customer support chatbot using NLP”, when fed into Trae.ai, yields a functional chatbot API that’s ready for deployment.

Also read, How Self-Hosting LLM’s can save you thousand of $$$

Real-World Applications of Vibe Coding

Vibe coding is fueling rapid prototyping, enabling startups to test MVPs (Minimum Viable Products) swiftly and cost-effectively.

: From inventory tracking to payment gateways, vibe coding simplifies backend processes for e-commerce platforms, enhancing efficiency.

: Healthcare organizations are using vibe coding to develop diagnostic applications, telemedicine systems, and patient management platforms.

Gaming and Creative Design: Gaming companies employ vibe coding for procedural level design, character scripting, and interactive storytelling based on user prompts.

Also Read, Top Uncensored Models of 2025,

The Future of Vibe Coding

What lies ahead for vibe coding?

With the arrival of more sophisticated LLMs, vibe coding tools will generate cleaner, smarter, and more secure code, reducing manual oversight.

Vibe coding will empower non-tech users to create apps, fostering innovation across industries like education, fashion, and entertainment.

Cross-Industry Expansion: Industries from architecture to media will adopt vibe coding to streamline technical workflows.

Integration with Low-Code Platforms: Vibe coding tools will merge with low-code/no-code platforms, offering users the flexibility to make manual adjustments to AI-generated code.

items.title: How I Built an AI-Powered Text Processor Using Chrome AI API.
items.author: Chidubem Okoli
items.content:
When I first discovered the Chrome AI API, I recognized its potential immediately. The ability to integrate AI-powered text processing directly into a web app—without requiring a backend—opens up new possibilities for seamless user experiences. Using React and TailwindCSS, I built a practical AI Text Processor capable of summarizing, translating, and detecting languages entirely in the browser.

In this guide, I’ll walk you through: ✔ Why the Chrome AI API is a game-changer

✔ Step-by-step setup (including troubleshooting tips)

✔ How I built the UI with React & TailwindCSS

✔ Lessons learned and where to go next

Before diving in, you’ll need:

1) Comply with Google’s AI Policies

  • Ensure your use case follows Google’s Generative AI Prohibited Use Policy.
  • Download Chrome Canary (v129.0.6639.0 or newer). Why Canary? The API is experimental and only available here for now.

3) Check Storage Requirements

  • Minimum 22GB free storage. If storage drops below 10GB, Chrome automatically deletes the model.

4) Enable the Summarization API

  • Open chrome://flags/#summarization-api-for-gemini-nano

5) Force-Download the AI Model

  • Open DevTools (F12) and run:

await ai.summarizer.create(); // Triggers model download await ai.summarizer.capabilities(); // Check status Repeat the second command until it returns "readily" (~3-5 mins).

"The model was available but there was no execution config available for the feature."

Wait 24 hours and retry (Google rolls out access gradually).

Troubleshooting Tip: For full documentation, check Chrome’s AI API Guide here.

This API brings serverless AI to the browser with: ✅ No backend needed – Runs entirely client-side.

✅ Blazing fast – Responses in milliseconds.

✅ Privacy-focused – No data sent to third-party servers.

✅ Easy integration – Just call ai. methods like translate() or summarize().

The AI Text Processor includes:

  • Text Input - A responsive text area for content entry

  • Language Detection - Automatic identification of input text language

  • Text Summarization - Concise distillation of key information

  • Multilingual Translation - Conversion between supported languages

  • Accessible Interface - Screen reader compatible with keyboard navigation

  • Error Handling - Graceful failure modes and user feedback

  • React – UI components & state management.

  • TailwindCSS – Rapid styling.

  • Chrome AI API – ai.summarizer, ai.translator, ai.detector.

1) Initialize the Project

npm create vite@latest ai-text-processor --template react cd ai-text-processor

npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer npx tailwindcss init -p

Configure tailwind.config.js:

export default { content: ["./index.html", "./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"], plugins: [],

@tailwind base; @tailwind components;

3) Create the UI A simple layout with:

Buttons for actions (Summarize/Translate/Detect).

A results panel (conditional rendering with error handling).

4) Integrate the Chrome AI API

const handleSummarize = async () => { try {

const summary = await ai.summarizer.summarize(text);

setResult(summary); setResult("Error: " + error.message); };

More languages – Expand translation support.

Offline mode – Cache results for poor connectivity.

Custom prompts – Let users tweak summarization style.

The Chrome AI API opens up exciting possibilities for browser-based AI apps. While still experimental, it’s a glimpse into a future where frontend devs can leverage AI without backend complexity.

GitHub Repo Link here Live Link hereNote: This implementation is currently available only for desktop platforms

items.title: Will Software Testers Lose Their Jobs To AI Testing Tools?
items.author: Ronika Kashyap
items.content:
The testing process has never been as efficient as it is now due to new and better practices introduced in the market. The testers are able to perform their jobs without having to repeat their actions since the implementation of automation.

The emergence of large-scale language models has led to a debate on what the future holds for software testers. According to Forbes, about 44% of companies are keen on investing in artificial intelligence (AI) in the next few years. Due to its capability to solve intricate tasks and provide optimal results, many people wonder if AI testing tools are going to completely eliminate the need for human testers.

AI streamlines operations, but here, human instinct plays a role in software examination. In this blog, we will concentrate on the implications of AI on testing practices and the ways that testers are preparing for the AI environment.

The Impact of AI in Software Testing and the New World of Software Testing

AI technology is slowly but surely seeping its way into software testing, and this has impacted various aspects of testing. It includes:

: The integration of AI into testing has made it possible to automate several tasks that would otherwise require one to do them manually, for instance, data entry or even doing a detailed test case. While this will help to reduce the number of tasks in the testing environment, this will greatly reduce the need for human testers.

: AI technologies can be applied to make activities at lower levels of testing more efficient. Software testers can utilize AI's efficiency by making routine tasks automatic so that they have less work to do and can focus more on critical areas of testing.

3. Traditional Testing Tools: Most of the testing tools available in the market today are designed with manual testers in mind. This means that the testing tools may become less valuable as AI solutions are adopted for use in testing.

It is, however, important to note that AI cannot assume the full role of software testing as:

: While AI can be useful in building some of the tests, human aspects of creativity and judgment are needed while constructing efficient and complex test cases. This means that there is still the need to involve the human element in the process.

5. Interpreting Test Results: AI has capability of testing large amount of data quickly. But the human factor is still crucial when it comes to understanding how software functions and what the users want in terms of the overall picture.

6. Communicating With Shareholders: Software developers not only do their best to make sure that they understand all that they see, but they also make sure to put in simple terms that even a lay man will understand. On one hand, AI tools may transfer test results from one point to another, but on the other hand human testers know how to interact with the stakeholders in a beneficial way.

CoTester™ from TestGrid – A new era in software testing through AI

With the availability of TestGrid’s CoTester™, a new approach to software testing has emerged. This has impacted the way testers work and has enhanced the efficiency and accuracy of the testers while performing their tasks.

  • AI-Powered Testing Platform: Innovative AI in software testing, CoTester™ stands on the foundations of the Artificial Intelligence algorithms that can revolutionize software testing.
  • Pre-Trained on Software Testing Fundamentals: It knows about the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) which makes the testing process efficient.
  • : It naturally integrates into contemporary processes and supports various tools, architectures, languages, and testing frameworks like Selenium, Appium, Cypress, Robot, Cucumber, Webdriver, etc.
  • : It can do things such as generate manual and automated test cases, execute tests on real mobile devices and browsers, and integrate with project management tools.
  • Testing Efficiency and Accuracy: This means that before and after deployment, bugs, and performance problems can be diagnozed early, which are caused by employing AI algorithms.
  • Project Management Integration: It also goes beyond the testing tools and becomes an inseparable part of project management tools to track bugs, assign tasks, take notes during sprints, and manage deadlines.
  • : Adaptive learning has made the automation tasks more efficient and faster in the process.
  • : This will help to see the future of software testing in action and how AI will change the methods of testing. With the help of AI, testers have the opportunity to increase their productivity and enhance the quality of the developed software products.

Ai-based testing is here for the long run. Tools like CoTester™ of TestGrid shows a glimpse of how AI automation testing can revolutionize practice while enriching the human testers’ work. Although the usage of AI is a disruptive technology it enables software testers to venture outside their traditional box and usher a new era of advancement.

items.title: How to use Cursor + MCP to build AI app in 5 minutes on SAP ERP and S/4HANA On-Premise
items.author: Bartosz Siminski
items.content:
The emergence of new AI models and the dynamic changes that are taking place before our eyes in the application development process raise the question of how this new technology can be used to rapidly create products integrated with the SAP platform.

The integration of and development tools such as Cursor offers speed and is becoming a key ingredient for modernizing SAP systems at a moderate cost, on top of which this technology is available today in an On-Premise systems.

In this article, we discuss how to apply the latest AI models like Claude Sonnet 3.7 to create an application connected to SAP using Cursor and the MCP protocol, without the need for a Business Technology Platform or cloud infrastructure.

Vibe Coding is an approach to software development that uses AI to transform natural language descriptions into fully functional program code. Previously, it was a consultant who collected functional requirements and then worked with developers to create an extension.

Now, instead of writing code by hand, users describe verbally what they need and artificial intelligence generates, tests and refines the code itself.

Cursor is a new product, a highly optimized coding assistant designed to create applications together with AI. It allows you to create apps in minutes/hours instead of weeks/months.

Cursor leverages advanced AI models, such as OpenAI GPT-4o, o1, GPT-4-mini, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, or 3.7 Sonnet, and other local LLM models, to speed up coding processes, allowing developers to create applications with AI.

Can Vibe Coding and Cursor be used with SAP?

Vibe Coding, combined with Cursor and MCP (Model Context Protocol), creates a powerful system for SAP development, enabling natural language-driven creation of both ABAP backend elements and modern React frontends, while integrating with SAP On-Premises systems.

The developer describes the desired SAP functionality in plain English (e.g., “Create a purchase order approval app with a Fiori-like interface”) to create a functional specification based on business requirements. Translates requirements into technical specification using: Input provided by the user and pre-defined project rules

List of available APIs in SAP (for example, ABAP modules that serve the data),

Utilizing the MCP protocol for custom operations. Acts as middleware between Cursor and SAP systems to access available APIs, list provided services, and deploy configuration to the SAP system.

* we will build an app step by step to visualize the whole process for better understanding.

Let’s Build an app on SAP On-Premise with AI in 5 minutes We will build a web application for SAP that displays a list of employees in the SAP HCM module via a web browser, all hosted directly in SAP.

Our goal is to build the application in less than 5 minutes to demonstrate the true value that new AI tools bring to the SAP platform.

Our application will consist of two basic components:

An ABAP function module that provides the data for the app, A React app that utilizes the data from SAP HCM to visualize it

: Create function module in ABAP Let’s go to Cursor. We will create an ABAP function module needed to serve the data by simply typing a Vibe Coding prompt for Claude Cursor AI. We will use the AI model called Claude Sonnet 3.5:

Write a function module that returns information about employees

It took AI 10 seconds! to generate operational ABAP code, which we can now save and activate directly on SAP from Cursor. This function module is automatically available to the Cursor API via our SAP add-on, so Cursor can access it and see how it can use it to retrieve the data.

: Create a React App to Display Employee Data Let’s create an app that will show us this data. Now, we will ask Claude AI to create the app for us automatically, just by typing:

Create a React application that shows basic information about employees, then publish it on SAP.

It takes Cursor and its AI to set up everything for us, including:

  • Creating all the needed project files,
  • Automatically calling SAP to read the description of the API (from step 1),
  • Writing all the React code needed for the application to work,
  • Installing all the necessary dependencies and setting up build scripts
  • Running it, so we don’t have to do it manually

Step 3: Deploy and Run the App on SAP The last step is to publish the app on the SAP Application Server. We will again utilize our MCP add-on, which handles all the steps. We simply ask AI to publish it on SAP by typing:

Are you already familiar with our AI Add On for SAP On-Premises? Let AI bring value to your team and organization. Contact us today to implement these AI technologies in your SAP On-Premise system.

Let's stay in touch! We can help you with:

Integration of AI tools with SAP infrastructure Custom MCP Add-On development for SAP

Building custom applications hosted on SAP

Building custom AI applications around SAP

items.title: Automating Trade Compliance: AI-Powered Tariff & Classification Updates
items.author: John Hall
items.content:

items.title: Image Processing with AWS Textract (Extracting Text from Newspaper Images I)
items.author: Ehi Enabs
items.content:
Amazon Textract is a powerful AWS service that allows users to extract text, handwriting, and structured data from scanned documents, including newspaper images. This guide will walk you through setting up batch processing for extracting text from newspaper images stored in an Amazon S3 bucket using Textract.

Before you begin, ensure you have the following:

An AWS account with appropriate permissions.

An S3 bucket containing newspaper images.

An IAM role with permissions for Amazon Textract, S3, and AWS Lambda (optional for automation).

The AWS CLI or SDK (Boto3 for Python) is installed.

Step 1: Upload Newspaper Images to S3

Navigate to the AWS S3 Console.

Create or select an existing bucket.

Upload the newspaper images you want to process.

Step 2: Create an IAM Role for Textract

Go to the AWS IAM Console.

Create a new role with the following permissions:

{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": [
    "textract:StartDocumentTextDetection",
    "textract:GetDocumentTextDetection",
    "s3:GetObject",
    "s3:PutObject"
  ],
  "Resource": "*"
}

Attach this policy to your IAM role and note the ARN.

Step 3: Start a Textract Batch Processing Job

Using the AWS CLI, start the text extraction job:

aws textract start-document-text-detection \
    --document-location "S3Object={Bucket=<your-bucket>,Name=<image-file>}" \
    --notification-channel "RoleArn=<your-iam-role-arn>,SNSTopicArn=<sns-topic-arn>"

Alternatively, using Boto3 in Python:

import boto3

def start_textract_job(bucket, document):
    textract = boto3.client('textract')
    response = textract.start_document_text_detection(
        DocumentLocation={
            'S3Object': {
                'Bucket': bucket,
                'Name': document
            }
        }
    )
    return response['JobId']

job_id = start_textract_job("your-bucket", "your-image.jpg")
print(f"Job started with ID: {job_id}")

Step 4: Retrieve the Extracted Text

Once the job is completed, retrieve the results:

aws textract get-document-text-detection --job-id <your-job-id>aws textract get-document-text-detection --job-id <your-job-id>

import time

def get_textract_results(job_id):
    textract = boto3.client('textract')
    while True:
        response = textract.get_document_text_detection(JobId=job_id)
        if response['JobStatus'] == 'SUCCEEDED':
            break
        time.sleep(5)
    return response['Blocks']

blocks = get_textract_results(job_id)
for block in blocks:
    if block['BlockType'] == 'LINE':
        print(block['Text'])

Step 5: Store and Process Extracted Text

Once you extract the text, you can:

Store it in an S3 bucket.

Process it with AWS Lambda and DynamoDB.

Perform text analysis using Amazon Comprehend.

Using Amazon Textract, you can efficiently extract text from newspaper images stored in S3 via batch processing. This enables large-scale document processing, automation, and text analytics in AWS.
